title: IMMZD2DTDTPPregnancyStartingWith4Doses ValueSet for Decision Table Schema
description: JSON Schema for IMMZD2DTDTPPregnancyStartingWith4Doses ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Values are represented as Coding objects with 'system' and 'code' properties.

enum: Three DTP primary series doses were administered-124
One tetanus and diphtheria booster dose was administered-141
Client is due for tetanus and diphtheria booster dose-114
Two tetanus and diphtheria booster doses were administered-140
The latest tetanus and diphtheria dose was administered less than 1 year ago-131
Client is not due for tetanus and diphtheria booster dose-118
The latest tetanus and diphtheria dose was administered more than 1 year ago-131
Three tetanus and diphtheria booster doses were administered-140
Tetanus and diphtheria immunization schedule is complete-119

narrative: This schema validates Coding-shaped objects for the IMMZD2DTDTPPregnancyStartingWith4Doses ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet. Each value must be an object with 'system' (CodeSystem URI) and 'code' (fragment after '#') properties. Display values are available at http://smart.who.int/immunizations/ValueSet-IMMZD2DTDTPPregnancyStartingWith4DosesVS.displays.json. The canonical IRI for a code can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code. For a complete listing of all ValueSets, see artifacts.html#terminology-value-sets.
